research_topics: Signal ensemble methods (MWU, EARCP, PPO alpha weighting, IR-based)
Metals-specific models (central bank flows, ML for gold/silver, G/S ratio velocity)
Crypto-specific models (composite on-chain CNN-LSTM, funding rate microstructure)
LLM agents for trading (TradingAgents debate framework, TradingGPT layered memory)
Walk-forward validation (double OOS, CPCV, hypothesis-driven WF)

findings.finding: IR-based signal weighting (FactSet 2026) — use Information Ratio (IC/IC_vol) as proportional weights, validated over 13 years. Numin paper: utility-weighted MWU updates instead of binary accuracy.
findings.relevance_to_us: We have IC infrastructure (ic_computation.py) and MWU (signal_weights.py). Unify into IR-proportional weighting.

findings.finding: Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection (BOCPD) — probabilistic regime shift detection, 1-3 bars faster than EMA crossover. Adams-MacKay algorithm is ~100 lines Python.
findings.relevance_to_us: Current detect_regime() is rule-based with known lag (BUG-156). BOCPD gives probability of change, not binary.

findings.finding: TradingAgents (UCLA+MIT, ICML 2025) — 7 specialized LLM agents with Bull/Bear debate. Structured debate catches blind spots vs monolithic decisions.
findings.relevance_to_us: Our Layer 2 is monolithic Claude invocation. Restructure prompt into debate format without extra API calls.

findings.finding: EARCP coherence-aware ensemble — coherence regularization term scales consensus confidence by inter-signal agreement. 12-of-17 agreement != 3-of-5 squeaker.
findings.relevance_to_us: Addresses our MIN_VOTERS=3 problem. Would quantify agreement quality, not just quantity.

findings.finding: Composite on-chain signals with CNN-LSTM achieved 82-84% directional accuracy for BTC cycle positioning. Individual metrics should be combined through ML, not voted independently.
findings.relevance_to_us: Our on_chain_btc signal (60% 1d) treats sub-metrics independently. A meta-model could improve to 70%+.

findings.finding: Tree-based classifiers (RF, XGBoost) best for precious metals direction. SVR-RBF for gold, ELM for silver. JPM model: 100 tonnes CB buying = 1.7% gold price increase.
findings.relevance_to_us: XAG accuracy at 49.2% — a LightGBM meta-learner on our 12 metals signals could improve to 60%+.

findings.finding: Double out-of-sample walk-forward (arXiv 2602.10785) — tests 81 window combinations. Performance highly sensitive to window size. Single WF runs can overfit.
findings.relevance_to_us: Could determine if our 49 disabled signals genuinely lack alpha or were evaluated in unfavorable windows.

findings.finding: Funding rate regime shifts Granger-cause price shocks. Sustained negative funding predicts short squeezes. Should be change-point signal, not level-based.
findings.relevance_to_us: Our funding_rate signal is disabled (30.8% at 1d). Retool as regime-transition detector using CUSUM/z-score.

recommended_improvements.title: IR-Based Signal Weighting + Utility MWU
recommended_improvements.description: Replace IC-multiplier bolt-on with proper IR-proportional weights. Modify MWU to use return magnitude instead of binary correct/incorrect.

recommended_improvements.title: BOCPD Regime Detection
recommended_improvements.description: Add Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection alongside rule-based detect_regime(). Output probability of regime change for continuous penalty scaling.

recommended_improvements.title: Structured Bull/Bear Debate in Layer 2
recommended_improvements.description: Restructure Layer 2 prompt into debate format: Bull analyst, Bear analyst, Risk manager, Final synthesis. Single Claude invocation.

recommended_improvements.title: LightGBM Meta-Learner for Metals
recommended_improvements.description: Train tree-based classifier on 12 metals signal outputs to predict 1d XAG direction. Walk-forward validated.

recommended_improvements.title: Composite On-Chain BTC Meta-Model
recommended_improvements.description: Replace independent on-chain sub-metric voting with gradient boosting meta-model. Target: 60% -> 70%+ BTC accuracy.
